query: heavy lens flare sun glare washout veil photograph haze
message: anti_aesthetics/lighting: lens flare overload — sun glare, washout, hexagonal flare artifacts, veiled hazy aesthetic

response.objective_caption: Delicate, branching frost crystals cover portions of a windowpane in the foreground, appearing as pale, feathery dendrites along the left and lower edges. Beyond the glass, thick tree trunks stand against a brilliant central light source that fills the upper middle of the frame with warm yellow-white radiance, while the right side of the composition falls into near-black shadow. The scene is cast entirely in tones of orange, amber, and brown.
response.anti_aesthetic_caption: Delicate, branching frost crystals cover portions of a windowpane in the foreground, appearing as pale, feathery dendrites along the left and lower edges. The photograph employs heavy intentional blur and soft focus, causing the background trees and light to dissolve into abstract, glowing masses. The central light source is deliberately overexposed to an extreme white-hot glow, creating blown-out highlights, while the entire image is suffused with a muted, faded monochrome palette of low-vibrancy orange and amber that lends a melancholic, retro atmosphere to the icy formations.
